name: Springtime Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups frozen broccoli pieces, thawed and cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spaghetti according to package directions; drain.
2. In a large pot, cook broccoli in boiling water until crisp yet tender, about 4 minutes. Drain and add to the pasta.
3. Add onions, garlic, peas, bell peppers, mushrooms, and parsley to the pasta.
4. Combine vinegar, lemon juice, mustard, oil, salt, basil, oregano, thyme, black pepper, and cayenne pepper in a mixing bowl.
5. Pour dressing over pasta mixture and toss gently until well mixed.
